    1. scope

Annotation Interface DefaultInterceptor

@Retention(RUNTIME) @Target(TYPE) public @interface DefaultInterceptor
Used to mark interceptors to bind by default to a target set of resources.
See Also:
  • Jakarta Interceptors 2.1

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    DefaultInterceptor.Scope
    Defines the scope of the target interceptor set.

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    DefaultInterceptor.Scope
    scope
    Defines the scope of coverage for the default class loader.

    • scope

      DefaultInterceptor.Scope scope
      Defines the scope of coverage for the default class loader.
      Returns:
      scope
      Default:
      MODULE
